jsonld.name: Retroactive Counterfactual Sharpening
jsonld.description: The paradoxical process where unrealized conversation trajectories become more vivid and detailed as the actual conversation progresses further from the divergence point, with counterfactuals gaining specificity and presence through retrospective projection rather than fading with distance.
